message:
test: expand proptest suites, harden resize simulation, and add regression seeds

- proptest_reports.rs: add signed-epoch roundtrip safety tests for negative
  (pre-1970) timestamps, add Unicode-safe truncation property tests replacing
  the byte-based ASCII-only strategy, add timestamp format parser validator
- proptest_runtime_compat.rs: new/expanded property-based tests for the
  dual-runtime abstraction layer
- simulation_resize_suite.rs: refactor resize state machine tests with
  improved invariant contracts and broader coverage
- asupersync_unix_socket.rs: update async integration tests for unix socket
  transport layer
- Add proptest-regressions files to preserve discovered failing seeds so
  they are re-checked on every future test run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 70d92d6392937b49bb016f6f50067f571751551ff5d08e8e1cfe67ba352e5a35 # shrinks to _dummy = 0

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is

+cc fec047cebaa4cf7afe9bd29eebbd217e7157d444386089d5a02fda1f7e1e7d8c # shrinks to base = 2.0, (min_exp, max_exp) = (0, 2)
